ValidationRule.description: If Does the customer have a Vendor Portal?=Yes the field "What portal & what's needed from Billing" should be populated
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Request_Type__c , "Vendor Form request"), ISPICKVAL( Does_the_customer_have_a_Vendor_Portal__c , 'Yes'), ISBLANK( What_portal_what_s_needed_from_Billing__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please populate "What portal & what's needed from Billing" field
